rows.outputPreview: {"answer":"Refresh work is deduplicated per tenant so same-tenant duplicate refresh requests coalesce into one refresh while different tenants continue in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e52c5d94ffev1lm5Heb6I0qws","blob_id":"auth_queue","message_id":"msg_e1ad3a27b001GOI8z67mR5z2Jt"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A global mutex was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["Markdown parser onboarding cleanup / prior_session_onboarding","Billing retry queue rationale / auth_queue"]}
